content:
- Final validation is green: make check, make lint, and make test all passed after refreshing the verify image and verify-service-test vendorHash entries.
- Marked the amd64 verify-image vulnerability bug task completed with passes=true and checked acceptance criteria, then ran .ralph/task_switch.sh successfully.
- Next is only final housekeeping: review diff, git add all, commit with the required task-finished message including test evidence, and git push.

- Started Choose-Task turn.
- Read prior progress log and list-active-tasks skill instructions.
- Next: refresh Ralph task summary, inspect current_tasks/current_tasks_done, resolve blockers, and write the selected task path to .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Refreshed .ralph/current_tasks.md and .ralph/current_tasks_done.md.
- Confirmed there are no active unblocked failing bug tasks; active failing candidates are two story-29 smell sets, story-29 tasks 04/05, and story-30 task 01.
- Inspected the repo stack: Nix flake with crane drives local build/test/lint and runtime image outputs; product code is mainly Rust workspace crates plus a Go verify-service binary; GitHub still uses publish workflows that consume flake metadata.
- Reviewed story-29 task 03 notes and workflow files; task 03 explicitly left GitHub Actions migration to task 04, making .ralph/tasks/story-29-migrate-to-nix-crane/04-task-migrate-ci-to-nix-only.md the most logical next task.
- Next after this context exits: execute story-29 task 04 and keep make check, make test, and make lint green.

- Read prior Ralph progress, .ralph/current_task.txt, and the required improve-code-boundaries and tdd skill files.
- Confirmed the active task is .ralph/tasks/story-29-migrate-to-nix-crane/04-task-migrate-ci-to-nix-only.md.
- Next: read the task file, determine whether it ends in TO BE VERIFIED or NOW EXECUTE, and proceed accordingly.

- Read story-29 task 04 and its existing plan artifact.
- Confirmed task 04 already has a detailed execution plan under 04-task-migrate-ci-to-nix-only_plans/2026-04-28-migrate-ci-to-nix-only-plan.md.
- Next: confirm whether that plan ends in NOW EXECUTE and, if so, inspect the current GitHub workflows and flake publish metadata surfaces to start executing the slices.

- Inspected flake.nix, publish-images.yml, promote-image-tags.yml, the workflow-specific AGENTS note, and the story-29 CI boundary smell file.
- Confirmed the repo already has a flake-owned publish catalog, Nix-native validation jobs, and no image-catalog.yml file; remaining work is to validate the current implementation, find any remaining drift or breakage, and finish task bookkeeping.
- Next: inspect workflow inventory, exercise the flake publish catalog locally, then decide whether workflow fixes are still needed before repo gates and hosted verification.

- Verified the flake-owned publish catalog locally with `nix eval --json .#github.publishImageCatalog`.
- Checked the remote and corrected the GitHub API target repo from an initial wrong guess to `djosh34/cockroach_migrate_tool` before hosted workflow inspection.
- Next: inspect the latest publish/promote workflow runs and job-level failures from the authenticated GitHub API, then fix any remaining workflow breakage.

- Confirmed task 04 implementation was already committed earlier as `b96ea3a` and then repaired by multiple follow-up commits on `master`.
- Latest hosted `publish-images` run is #78 for commit `9e53079ead9e0f7a634e8bc0d383de0a3d1a823f`; `publish-catalog` already succeeded and `validate-fast` / `validate-images` are in progress.
- Next: wait for local `make test` and the live hosted run, then update the task/smell files with the final verification evidence if both are green.

- Cleanly reran `make check` and `make lint` sequentially to completed code-0 exits.
- `make test` is still running; the live hosted `publish-images` run #78 remains in Nix validation/build phases with `publish-catalog` already green.
- Next: wait for `make test` and the hosted run to finish, then patch the Ralph task/smell files with final acceptance evidence and close the task.

- Sequential reruns of `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all completed successfully with exit code 0.
- No code changes appear necessary for task 04 itself; only Ralph bookkeeping remains, gated on hosted verification finishing.
- Next: keep polling GitHub Actions run #78 until it reaches a final state, then patch task 04 and the smell set with the verification evidence.

- Hosted run #78 has now completed the Nix validation phases successfully and fanned out into the four parallel `publish-image` matrix jobs across amd64/arm64 and runner/verify images.
- That confirms the flake-owned matrix and Nix-only publish path are actually driving GitHub Actions, not just evaluating locally.
- Next: wait for the full hosted run outcome so task 04 can be marked with end-to-end verification evidence instead of partial progress.

- All local required repo gates are green and hosted run #78 continues to progress through the Nix-built publish matrix without any failed job yet.
- Current hosted evidence is stronger than earlier checks: validation and image-build jobs are complete and all four publish-image jobs are actively publishing the flake-built archives.
- Next: keep polling until the workflow reaches a final conclusion, then update Ralph task metadata and finish the required commit/push bookkeeping.

- Hosted verification is now complete: authenticated GitHub Actions run `#78` (`25028373105`) for commit `9e53079ead9e0f7a634e8bc0d383de0a3d1a823f` finished with conclusion `success` after publish matrix, Quay security gate, and publish-manifest all passed.
- Updated story-29 task 04 and the corresponding CI boundary smell file to completed/pass=true with exact verification evidence and command surfaces.
- Next: run `.ralph/task_switch.sh`, review the final diff, commit all tracked/untracked changes with the required task-finished message, and push.
